channel.title: Tickets on Emerald City Gear
channel.description: Recent content in Tickets on Emerald City Gear

item.title: Seattle Mariners Opening Day 2026: Everything You Need to Be Ready
item.description: Opening Day is Thursday, March 26. Here's everything you need — tickets, gear, how to watch, and key games to mark on your calendar for the Mariners' 50th anniversary season.

item.title: The Astros Are Coming to T-Mobile Park — And This Is a Series You Need to See
item.description: The Seattle Mariners host the Houston Astros for a four-game divisional series April 10–13 at T-Mobile Park. Here's why this is the home stand you shouldn't miss.

item.title: Rough Start: Mariners Drop Opening Day, But the Series Isn't Over
item.description: The Mariners fell 6-4 to Cleveland on Opening Day, but there's still plenty to build on — and three more games against the Guardians this weekend before the Yankees roll into town.

item.title: Best Seats at T-Mobile Park: A Section-by-Section Guide
item.description: Best seats at T-Mobile Park for Seattle Mariners games — section-by-section breakdown for every type of fan and budget.
